prospect_title.description: Current job title of the prospect

linkedin_profile_data.description: Raw or structured LinkedIn profile data for the prospect (optional)

company_research.description: Recent news, funding, product launches, or other company-level context (optional)

sender_name.description: Full name of the person sending the message

value_prop.description: Core value proposition or reason for outreach, in the sender's own words

message_type.description: The type of LinkedIn message to write
